title: 'Indescribably hurt' Son apologises for South Korea World Cup exit
summary: Son Heung-min apologizes for South Korea's early World Cup exit and vows to work harder for the nation's fans. The apology comes following the team's disappointing campaign in the tournament.
content: Son Heung-min apologises for South Korea's early World Cup exit and says he will "run to death" for the nation's football fans.

zh.title: "难以名状的伤心"孙兴慜为韩国世界杯出局道歉
zh.summary: 孙兴慜为韩国早日退出世界杯而道歉，并誓言为国家球迷更加努力。这一道歉是在球队在锦标赛中表现令人失望之后发出的。

title: 'Pandur poised for Rangers as Butland heads for Hull' - gossip
summary: Hull City goalkeeper Ivor Pandur is poised to join Rangers with Jack Butland moving in the opposite direction, while several Scottish clubs field bids for key players. The transfer reflects ongoing movement in Scottish football ahead of the new season.
content: Rangers are reportedly poised to sign Hull City goalkeeper Ivor Pandur, with Jack Butland moving in the opposite direction, as Aberdeen, Dundee, Dundee United and Motherwell are said to have received bids for key players.

zh.title: "潘德尔准备加盟流浪者，巴特兰前往赫尔" - 转会绯闻
zh.summary: 赫尔城门神伊沃尔·潘德尔准备加盟流浪者，杰克·巴特兰将朝相反方向转会，同时多家苏格兰俱乐部为关键球员出价。这次转会反映了新赛季前苏格兰足球的持续变动。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 23
summary: Readers are invited to identify a World Cup player from limited information in this interactive guessing game. The puzzle challenges fans to recognize tournament stars with minimal clues.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯明星23号
zh.summary: 邀请读者在这个互动猜谜游戏中根据有限信息识别世界杯球员。这个谜题通过最少线索挑战球迷识别锦标赛明星。

title: Emotional Gakpo scores days after loss of unborn son
summary: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo scores for the Netherlands days after the loss of his unborn son, though the team is eliminated on penalties by Morocco. The emotional performance underscores both his personal tragedy and the team's World Cup disappointment.
content: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo scores for the Netherlands days after the loss of his unborn son, as they are knocked out on penalties by Morocco.

zh.title: 加克波失子数日后打进感人一球
zh.summary: 利物浦前锋加克波在失去未出生儿子数日后为荷兰队进球，但荷兰队最终在点球大战中被摩洛哥队淘汰。这场充满情感的表现既凸显了他个人的悲剧，也反映了荷兰队在世界杯中的遗憾。

title: Netherlands crumble in penalty shootout as Morocco reach last 16
summary: Morocco defeats the Netherlands 4-3 on penalties to advance to the World Cup round of 16, with the Dutch missing three spot kicks in Monterrey. The comeback victory marks a significant achievement for Morocco in the tournament.
content: Netherlands miss three spot kicks as Morocco come from behind to beat the Dutch on penalties in Monterrey to reach the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 荷兰队点球遗憾出局，摩洛哥晋级十六强
zh.summary: 摩洛哥在点球大战中以4-3战胜荷兰队，晋级世界杯十六强，荷兰队在蒙特雷罚失三球。这场逆转胜利标志着摩洛哥在本届赛事中的重大成就。

title: Inside Paraguay's tears of joy over their seismic World Cup shock
summary: Paraguay celebrates one of the largest victories in their footballing history with euphoric celebrations following a shock World Cup result. The stunning win represents a historic moment for the nation's football program.
content: How Paraguay marked one of the biggest wins in their footballing history with euphoric celebrations.

zh.title: 巴拉圭为创造性世界杯奇迹而欢欣雀跃
zh.summary: 巴拉圭在创造足球历史上最大胜利之一后欢呼雀跃，庆祝世界杯中的震撼性成果。这次惊人的胜利代表了该国足球项目的历史性时刻。

title: 'Germany play one way - and it doesn't work anymore'
summary: Studio analysts examine why Germany's tactical approach failed as the team exits the World Cup to Paraguay. The discussion centers on the team's one-dimensional playing style and strategic vulnerabilities.
content: The team in the studio talk about what went wrong for Germany as they go out of the World Cup to Paraguay

zh.title: 德国只用一种方式踢球——而这种方式已经不再有效了
zh.summary: 演播室分析师探讨了为什么德国的战术方法在球队被巴拉圭淘汰出世界杯时失败了。讨论的重点是球队的一维踢球风格和战略漏洞。

title: The end for Nagelsmann? Germany suffer their 'next football nightmare'
summary: Germany exits the 2026 World Cup after losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, marking their first-ever World Cup penalty shootout loss and intensifying pressure on manager Julian Nagelsmann. The shock last-32 elimination raises questions about the team's future direction.
content: Germany make a shock last-32 exit against Paraguay, losing a World Cup penalty shootout for the first time to pile pressure on boss Julian Nagelsmann.

zh.title: 纳格尔斯曼的末日？德国遭遇他们的"下一场足球噩梦"
zh.summary: 德国在点球大战中以4-3负于巴拉圭后退出2026世界杯，这是他们有史以来第一次在世界杯点球大战中失败，进一步加剧了对主教练朱利安·纳格尔斯曼的压力。这一令人震惊的32强淘汰赛引发了关于球队未来方向的疑问。

title: 'A joke' - how a 'terrible' VAR disallowed goal cost Germany
summary: Prominent pundits including Alan Shearer and Jurgen Klopp criticize a VAR decision that disallowed a potential winning goal for Germany before their penalty loss to Paraguay. The controversial call adds to the debate over Germany's elimination.
content: Alan Shearer, Jurgen Klopp, Pat Nevin and Darren Cann feel Germany were hard done by as a VAR call rules out a potential winning goal before they lose on penalties to Paraguay.

zh.title: "一场笑话"——一个"糟糕的"VAR判罚如何让德国失去进球
zh.summary: 包括艾伦·希勒和尤尔根·克洛普在内的知名评论员批评了一项VAR判罚，该判罚在德国点球负于巴拉圭之前取消了德国的一个潜在进球。这一争议判罚加剧了关于德国被淘汰的辩论。

title: Berhalter in tears after son Sebastian's WC goal
summary: Chicago Fire manager Gregg Berhalter was moved to tears after his son Sebastian scored his first World Cup goal for the U.S. Men's National Team against Turkey in a group stage match. The moment marks a significant personal achievement and national milestone for the Berhalter family.
content: Chicago Fire manager Gregg Berhalter was brought to tears when thinking about son Sebastian Berhalter's first World Cup goal for the United States men's national team against Türkiye in the final group stage match.

zh.title: 伯哈尔特为儿子塞巴斯蒂安的世界杯进球泪流满面
zh.summary: 芝加哥火队主教练格雷格·伯哈尔特为他的儿子塞巴斯蒂安在小组赛中对阵土耳其时为美国男子国家足球队打入首个世界杯进球而感动落泪。这一时刻标志着伯哈尔特家族的重大个人成就和国家里程碑。

title: Germany beaten on penalties as Paraguay reach last 16
summary: Four-time World Cup champion Germany is eliminated by Paraguay 4-3 on penalties following a 1-1 draw after extra time. The shocking defeat marks Germany's exit from the round of 32 in this World Cup.
content: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup, losing to Paraguay 4-3 on penalties, following a 1-1 draw after extra time.

zh.title: 德国在点球大战中被巴拉圭击败晋级16强
zh.summary: 四次世界杯冠军德国在加时赛1:1平手后,以4:3的点球大战被巴拉圭击败出局。这次令人震惊的失利标志着德国在本届世界杯32强轮的出局。

title: Paraguay stun Germany on pens after VAR drama
summary: Germany were eliminated from the 2026 World Cup on penalties against Paraguay after key players Kai Havertz, Nick Woltemade, and Jonathan Tah missed crucial kicks. The shock defeat ends the four-time World Cup champions' tournament hopes in the round of 32.
content: Kai Havertz, Nick Woltemade and Jonathan Tah missed crucial penalties as Germany were eliminated from the World Cup in a shootout by Paraguay.

zh.title: 巴拉圭点球击败德国，VAR风波之后
zh.summary: 德国在与巴拉圭的点球大战中被淘汰出2026年世界杯，关键球员凯·哈弗茨、尼克·沃尔特梅德和乔纳森·塔赫都未能罚进关键球。这场意外失利结束了这支四次世界杯冠军球队在32强的世界杯梦想。

title: Brazil survive World Cup scare against Japan
summary: Brazil narrowly avoided a major World Cup upset against Japan, with midfielder Casemiro crediting the team's composure for the comeback victory. The result keeps Brazil's tournament ambitions alive despite ongoing concerns about the squad's age.
content: Casemiro said Brazil avoided one of the all-time great World Cup shocks against Japan by keeping "calm."

zh.title: 巴西成功度过对阵日本的世界杯危机
zh.summary: 巴西险些被日本爆冷击败，中场球员卡塞米罗将球队的稳定性归功于逆转胜利。尽管球队年龄结构存在持续担忧，但这一结果保持了巴西对锦标赛的雄心。

title: Chicago Fire complete Lewandowski signing
summary: Chicago Fire FC completed the signing of striker Robert Lewandowski from Barcelona and Bayern Munich. The high-profile transfer represents a major move for the MLS club and a significant late-career shift for the legendary goal scorer.
content: Chicago Fire FC have completed the signing of former Barcelona and Bayern Munich striker Robert Lewandowski.

zh.title: 芝加哥火焰完成莱万多夫斯基签约
zh.summary: 芝加哥火焰足球俱乐部完成了从巴塞罗那和拜仁慕尼黑签下前锋罗伯特·莱万多夫斯基。这笔备受瞩目的转会对美职联球队是一项重大举措，也是这位传奇射手职业生涯后期的重大转变。

title: Nico Paz to stay at Como; Madrid deal reached
summary: Real Madrid and Como have reached an agreement for midfielder Nico Paz to remain at the Italian club for the upcoming season. The arrangement allows Paz to continue developing away from Madrid while remaining connected to the Spanish giant.
content: Real Madrid, Como and Nico Paz have reached an agreement for the player to stay at the Italian club next season

zh.title: 尼科·帕斯继续效力科莫；与皇马达成协议
zh.summary: 皇马和科莫达成协议，中场球员尼科·帕斯将在即将到来的赛季继续留在意大利俱乐部。这项安排使帕斯能够在远离皇马的情况下继续发展，同时与这家西班牙豪门保持联系。

title: Canale scores winning penalty after Tah blazes over as Germany knocked out
summary: Germany were knocked out of the 2026 World Cup on penalties after Jonathan Tah sent his sudden-death penalty well over the crossbar. Paraguay's Jose Canale converted the decisive penalty to eliminate the four-time champions in a shocking round-of-32 upset.
content: Four-time winners Germany are knocked out of the 2026 World Cup on penalties as Jonathan Tah blazes over in sudden death before Jose Canale scores the winning penalty.

zh.title: 塔赫浪费点球，卡纳莱绝杀，德国遭淘汰
zh.summary: 德国在2026年世界杯16强点球大战中遭淘汰，原因是后卫乔纳森·塔赫将突然死亡点球踢飞。巴拉圭的何塞·卡纳莱打入制胜点球，以令人震惊的冷门淘汰了四次世界杯冠军。
